# Easy Brands

> Hobart-based design studio offering brand identity, web design, and print & signage for Tasmanian businesses and clients internationally.

Easy Brands is a creative design studio based in Hobart, Tasmania, Australia. We help businesses build purposeful, lasting identities through strategic design. We work locally and internationally.

## Services

- [Brand Design](https://easybrands.com.au/brand): Strategy-led brand identity including logo systems, colour palettes, typography, brand guidelines, and stationery.
- [Web Design](https://easybrands.com.au/website): Custom website design and development. Fast, accessible, and built from your brand up — not from a template.
- [Print & Signage](https://easybrands.com.au/print): Business cards, brochures, flyers, signage, and large-format print. All files prepared to professional print standards.

## Selected Projects

- [Brewster Coffee](https://easybrands.com.au/projects/brewster): Brand identity for a Hobart coffee brand — logo, packaging, signage, and merchandise.
- [Motor Cycle City](https://easybrands.com.au/projects/motor-cycle-city): Brand identity for a local motorcycle dealership — monogram logo, signage, and marketing materials.
- [Sandy Bay Garden Co](https://easybrands.com.au/projects/sandy-bay-garden-co): Brand identity and print for a Hobart gardening service — logo, stationery, and signage.
- [Smokey7 Café](https://easybrands.com.au/projects/smokey7): Brand identity and print for a Kingscote café — logo, menus, signage, and digital assets.
